reason: named 'race condition' (race) at event 1, before first successful runtime probe at event 24
first_probe_cmd:
export ACCOUNT_ID="test-$(date +%s)"
# Create account by depositing 1 cent
curl -s -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"account": "'"$ACCOUNT_ID"'", "amount_cents": 1}' $API_URL/deposit > /dev/null

python3 -c '
import os
import requests
import time

API_URL = os.environ["API_URL"]
ACCOUNT_ID = os.environ["ACCOUNT_ID"]

balance = 1
for i in range(10):
    deposit_res = requests.post(f"{API_URL}/deposit", json={"account": ACCOUNT_ID, "amount_cents": 1})
    if deposit_res.status_code != 200:
        print(f"Deposit failed: {deposit_res.text}")
        continue

    new_balance = deposit_res.json()["balance_cents"]
    print(f"Deposit successful. New balance: {new_balance}")

    balance_res = requests.get(f"{API_URL}/balance?account={ACCOUNT_ID}")
    if balance_res.status_code != 200:
        print(f"Balance check failed: {balance_res.text}")
        continue

    reported_balance = balance_res.json()["balance_cents"]
    source = balance_res.json()["source"]
    print(f"Balance check successful. Reported balance: {reported_balance} from {source}")
    if reported_balance != new_balance:
        print(f"BUG! Stale read detected. Expected {new_balance}, got {reported_balance} from {source}")
        break
'
